zh.Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, United King: 英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isobel Wallace of Craigie於1486年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉時，她的父親Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton23歲，母親Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart21歲。她和Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr至少有1個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1530年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度享年44歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度。

zh-hans.Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, United King: 英国苏格兰艾斯爾盧度
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isobel Wallace of Craigie于1486年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾可萊吉时，她的父亲Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton23岁，母亲Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart21岁。她和Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr至少有1个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1530年在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度享年44岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度。

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: Isobel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isobel Wallace of Craigie was born in 1486, in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton, was 23 and her mother, Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart, was 21. She had at least 1 son and 6 daughters with Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr. She died in 1530, in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 44, and was buried in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isobel Wallace of Craigie est née en 1486, à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles avec Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr. Elle est décédée en 1530, à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isobel Wallace of Craigie 1486 in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton 23 und ihre Mutter Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart 21. Sie hatte mit Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1530 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isobel Wallace of Craigie è nata il nel 1486 nel Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie con Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr. Morì nel 1530, nel Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, United King: イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウン
ja.lifeSummary: Isobel Wallace of Craigieが1486年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジで生まれた時，父Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccartonは23歳，母Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcartは21歳であった。彼女はHugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayrとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1530年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンで44歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isobel Wallace of Craigie(이)가 1486년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에 묻혔다.

mn.Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, United King: Loudoun, Air, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isobel Wallace of Craigie nasceu em 1486, em Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas com Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr. Ela faleceu em 1530, em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isobel Wallace of Craigie родилась в 1486 г. в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart, 21. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей от Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr. Она умерла в 1530 г. в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isobel Wallace of Craigie nació en 1486, en Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas con Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr. Murió en 1530, en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.
